name: Bomber Festival
short_description: Random map Bomberman, with customizable details, let's have a Bomberman party together!
detailed_description: Do you miss playing Bomberman from your childhood? This game can take you back to that joyful time. With randomly generated maps, every playthrough offers a unique experience. You can play online with friends or engage in strategic battles with AI. Customize settings such as map size, number of AI opponents, and item drops to suit your preferences. There are also advanced items such as Piercing Bomb, Remote Bomb, and Kick Bomb. There is also a challenge mode where you can keep challenging continuously. The high level of customization keeps the game fresh and prevents boredom. Give it a try!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
